_README: 100% SYNTHETIC sample data. These are not real patients, not real claims, and contain no PHI. Names are fictional. Generated by hand to exercise true positives, false positives, false negatives, and a code-level-vs-HCC-level disagreement. Safe to publish.

patients.label: Specificity miss: right condition, wrong/less-specific code (code-level FP+FN, but same HCC)
Coded a non-mapping code instead of the mapping one (lost HCC entirely)
Mixed: one correct, one missed, one unsupported
